title: AN ACT STANDARDIZING THE SALARIES OF OFFICERS AND EMPLOYEES OF THE BUREAU OF MINES, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 1701 S. NO. 525 / 68 OG No. 3, 406 (January 17, 1972)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6385, August 16, 1971 ]

AN ACT STANDARDIZING THE SALARIES OF OFFICERS AND EMPLOYEES OF THE BUREAU OF MINES, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. Other existing positions in the Bureau of Mines not covered above, except casual and emergency positions, are hereby authorized an increase of six WAPCO ranges each.

SEC. 3. In order to carry out the provisions of this Act for the fiscal year ending June 30, 1970, the Director of Mines with the approval of the Commissioner of the Budget, is hereby authorized to charge the salary differentials of the officials and employees whose salaries are herein standardized against any savings of the Bureau of Mines and the Mines Special Fund. Thereafter, the said sums shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4. The incumbents of the positions at the time of the approval of this Act, whose salaries are herein standardized shall automatically be entitled to the benefits hereof without the need of another appointment.

SEC. 5. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, August 16, 1971.
